title: sqli.inband
description: In-band (UNION) SQLi proven by the database computing a value the engine never transmitted and returning it in the response body, while a benign control does not.
x-notes: The engine builds the inband and control arms by planting each payloads value into injection.location of base_request; the arms differ only in that one slot.

The inband payload MUST contain the {{sqli_marker}} slot. Per run the engine substitutes it with a fresh arithmetic expression A*B (e.g. 73331*91237) and then requires the integer product to appear in the inband response body and to be absent from the control response. Reflection cannot fake this: the request carries the operands, never the product.

Author the inband payload as the smallest working UNION (or sub-select) that places {{sqli_marker}} in an in-band column; column count/positions come from your confirmed PoC. kind=query|form needs name; json_body needs json_pointer. For query the param must already be in base_request's URL.

Proof of the in-band READ CHANNEL only: it establishes that attacker SQL output reaches the response (arbitrary read is reachable), not that any specific table/column was exfiltrated. Record concrete data extraction (credentials, card data) as a PoC-level claim / blindspot.
